steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage says Demosthenes characterized parrhesia as the foundation of democracy, rather than merely a facilitator of the political system.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
The phrase needs to describe Demosthenes' relationship to parrhesia: someone who actively champions it. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — a proponent: an advocate or supporter of an idea — fits Demosthenes publicly characterizing parrhesia as democracy's foundation. ✓
  • Choice B — a steward: a caretaker who manages something on behalf of others — implies guardianship, not active advocacy. ✗
  • Choice C — an apprentice: a learner in training — suggests Demosthenes was still learning about parrhesia, not championing it. ✗
  • Choice D — a harbinger: a forerunner that signals what is to come — implies he was a precursor to parrhesia, not an advocate of it. ✗
That is the correct answer.
